text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I've been waiting for this! Finally, it's time for the
Unicorn Stakes!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Dirt or not—if it's a mile race, I ain't losin'!
choice_data_list: I know you have what it takes!
I know you have what it takes!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: You betcha! Just leave it to me!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Don't matter what kinda track it is, or who's on it!
I ain't fixin' to be beat!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I'm gunning for the Mile Championship, meaning I
gotta take this one too!
choice_data_list: Let's show them what you're made of!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Of course! I'm gonna run so fast, it'll blow
everybody's socks off!
